personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS Data Platform & AI/ML Pipeline Specialist

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and deep hands-on strength in Python, SQL, ETL pipeline design, data modeling, data warehousing, and large-scale telemetry platforms. Built and operated production data pipelines across AWS, Oracle, Redshift, S3, Glue, PySpark/Spark, and reporting platforms, with a strong focus on reliability, performance tuning, governance, automation, and operational documentation. Brings Staff/Senior-level architecture judgment, mentoring mindset, and practical experience turning raw enterprise data into trusted analytics, forecasting, and executive reporting assets.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual workflows with repeatable, governed data processes.
Designed and maintained AWS-based data platform components using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift analytics workloads, and Oracle-backed reporting stores.
Built PySpark/Spark processing patterns for large-scale telemetry and forecasting workloads, improving parallel processing and scalability for high-volume capacity data.
Designed Oracle schemas and historical retention structures supporting time-series analysis, seasonal capacity forecasting, and long-term data warehouse reporting.
Migrated heavy ML forecasting workloads using Prophet and scikit-learn from on-prem Oracle patterns toward Redshift-backed cloud-scale execution.
Implemented data validation, cleansing, reconciliation, and quality checks across telemetry feeds from TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, and related monitoring platforms.
Automated recurring extraction, transformation, reporting, monitoring, and dashboard workflows using Python, SQL, shell scripting, and operational runbooks.
Developed executive dashboards and analytics using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, and reporting layers to convert raw infrastructure data into actionable insights.
Supported governance and compliance needs in a regulated banking environment, including access controls, retention expectations, data quality, and audit-aware reporting practices.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and other critical hospitality systems, turning operational telemetry into performance and reliability insights.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance data to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing results, application behavior, and infrastructure performance during release validation.
Supported AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, application behavior, and data visibility requirements for web and mobile systems.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as enterprise CA APM SME managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across large-scale financial services environments.
Built Perl and Ksh automation scripts for recurring data extraction, operational reporting, alert management, and performance analysis.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and technical documentation used by engineering and operations teams for monitoring standards.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, WebSphere, Oracle, and Linux teams to troubleshoot bottlenecks and improve production visibility.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits, JDBC bottlenecks, thread contention, heap pressure, CPU constraints, and GC behavior.
Configured JMX monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to support troubleshooting and release performance gates.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for production readiness decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting transaction volume at massive scale.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing and Oracle database access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while preserving low-latency query behavior.
Built automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration test frameworks to verify correctness across millions of transaction records.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modernization modules for government-scale IRS CADE systems.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components while following structured architecture and documentation standards.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutexes, semaphores, socket programming, and Oracle/Pro*C integration.
Improved billing process performance by reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Maintained telecom billing, settlement, reporting, and interface systems across Oracle, PL/SQL, Unix, WebLogic/WebSphere, and batch processing environments.
Automated deployment and administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting and maintained production code across CVS and ClearCase.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, C++, Java, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok/xAI, FAISS vector embeddings, and sentence-transformers. The system performs semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered job scoring, tailored resume and cover generation, quality gates, and application tracking across structured local job folders.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Replaced manual forecasting with a Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit forecasting platform for banking-scale telemetry. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90% and produced capacity bottleneck predictions six months ahead for infrastructure planning.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark to support scalable ETL, Parquet-based data access, and AI-enabled Text-to-SQL workflows.
